name: patterns
description: Load common code patterns and abstractions used in this project. Use when implementing features to maintain consistency.
capabilities: Load data access patterns from project knowledge base
author: Clouder0
securitySummary: The static analyzer flagged 20 potential issues, but all are false positives. The flagged items are standard JSON metadata fields (URLs, hashes, description text) and generic documentation keywords that the scanner misinterpreted. This skill is a read-only knowledge-loading skill with no executable code, network access, file writes, or command execution. Only Read and Grep tools are allowed.
valueStatement: This skill provides access to common code patterns and abstractions used in your project. It ensures consistent implementation across features by loading established patterns for data access, API design, components, state management, and error handling.
limitations: Does not execute or modify code
Requires patterns.json file to exist in memory/knowledge

useCases.title: New feature implementation
useCases.description: Load established patterns before implementing new features to maintain consistency with existing codebase.

useCases.title: Onboarding assistance
useCases.description: Understand project conventions by loading pattern files that document how to structure code.

useCases.title: Consistency verification
useCases.description: Reference pattern documentation to verify implementations follow established abstractions.

promptTemplates.title: Load patterns
promptTemplates.prompt: Load the patterns skill and show me the data access patterns for this project.

promptTemplates.title: API design
promptTemplates.prompt: Using the API design patterns from the patterns skill, how should I structure this new endpoint?

promptTemplates.title: Component structure
promptTemplates.prompt: What component patterns does this project use? Show me examples from the patterns skill.

promptTemplates.title: Error handling
promptTemplates.prompt: Load the error handling patterns. How should I handle errors in this new service?

bestPractices: Load patterns before implementing features to understand project conventions
Cross-reference patterns with existing code to verify alignment
Update pattern documentation when introducing new abstractions
antiPatterns: Ignoring established patterns and introducing inconsistent implementations
Modifying pattern files without reviewing impact across the codebase
Creating new patterns without documenting them in the knowledge base

faq.question: What tools can use this skill?
faq.answer: This skill works with Claude, Codex, and Claude Code. It requires no additional configuration.

faq.question: What are the pattern categories?
faq.answer: Categories include data access, API design, components, state management, and error handling patterns.

faq.question: How do patterns integrate with existing code?
faq.answer: Patterns are loaded into context and used as reference guides for implementing consistent abstractions.

faq.question: Is my data safe?
faq.answer: Yes. This skill only reads pattern documentation and never writes, modifies, or transmits data.

faq.question: Why are patterns not loading?
faq.answer: Ensure the patterns.json file exists in memory/knowledge/codebase/ and contains valid pattern definitions.

faq.question: How is this different from conventions?
faq.answer: Patterns show how to structure code. Conventions specify style rules. Use patterns for architecture decisions.
